name: Document Processing MCP Server (FileGraph DocConvert)
what_it_does: MCP server from FileGraph for document processing — extracting text from documents, manipulating PDFs, and performing OCR on images. Enables AI agents to process document files: extract text content from PDFs, perform optical character recognition on scanned images, and transform document formats for downstream processing workflows.
use_cases: Extracting text from PDF documents for document analysis agents
OCR processing of scanned images and documents from data extraction agents
PDF manipulation and text retrieval from document intelligence agents
Converting document formats for processing pipelines from workflow agents
not_for: Complex PDF form filling or digital signing workflows
best_when: An agent needs to process document files — extracting text from PDFs or performing OCR on images — as part of a document intelligence or data extraction pipeline.
avoid_when: You need only native PDF parsing without OCR, or need a full document management system beyond text extraction.

auth.notes: No external auth — local document processing. File access controlled by filesystem permissions.

pricing.notes: Free open source from FileGraph. No external API costs for local processing.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — bounded by local processing capacity and file size

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Document processing can expose sensitive document content — apply appropriate data handling
OCR accuracy depends on image quality — pre-process images for best results (deskew, denoise)
Large documents can be slow to process locally — implement chunking for very large files
Community server (filegraph) — verify PDF library compatibility and OCR engine requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Documents may contain sensitive business/personal data. Local processing only. Filesystem permissions control access. No data sent to external servers.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY: Document content. Local processing — data stays on system. Filesystem access control.
